title: stizolobium axillare
intro: Stizolobium axillare, also known as the axillary bean or Brazilian cowpea, is a type of flowering plant in the legume family. Traditionally, it has been used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits associated with Stizolobium axillare include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Stizolobium axillare can be made into teas, infusions, or decoctions, which are often used to treat various ailments in traditional medicine practices.
